info.viSezaH: DAtupAWe vidyamAnam idam gaRasUtram asti  sidDAntakOmudyAm ciR te padaH 3.1.60 asmin sUtre idaM gaRasUtram pAWyate  tatra tasya vivecanam itTaM dattam asti - evakAro BinnakramaH  rADO'karmakAdevaSyan  udAharaRamAha vfdDAviti  yanmahyamaparADyati  druhyatItyarTaH  virADyantaM kzameta kaH  kfzRAya rADyati  dEvaM paryAlocayatItyarTaH  dEvasya DAtvarTe'ntarBAvAjjIvatyAdivadakarmakatvam - iti  asya sAmAnyaBAzAyAm ASayaH ayam - asmin gaRasUtre vidyamAnasya 'eva'Sabdasya anvayaH 'akarmakAt' ityanena karaRIyaH tataSca 'rAD 4.77 iti DAtoH akarmakavizaye eva vfdDyAdizu arTezu prayogaH Bavati' iti asya gaRasUtrasya arTaH karaRIyaH - iti  asya 'aparADyati virADyati rADyati' AdIni udAharaRAni api tatrEva dIyante
